  1. com.github.oshi.common
  2. oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd
  3. BsdPsKeyword

Uses of Enum Class
oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd.BsdPsKeyword

Packages that use BsdPsKeyword
Package
Description
oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd
Provides shared abstract base classes for the BSD-family operating systems
oshi.software.common.os.unix.dragonflybsd
Provides DragonFly BSD-specific shared software OS classes (abstract bases and no-native concrete implementations).
oshi.software.common.os.unix.freebsd
Provides abstract base classes and pure-Java implementations for the FreeBSD operating system, shared by the JNA and FFM modules.
oshi.software.common.os.unix.netbsd
Provides information about Software and OS on NetBSD
oshi.software.common.os.unix.openbsd
Provides abstract base classes and pure-Java implementations for the OpenBSD operating system, shared by the JNA and FFM modules.

  • Uses of BsdPsKeyword in oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd

    Subclasses with type arguments of type BsdPsKeyword in oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    BsdPsKeyword
    The union of ps output columns used by the BSD-family OSProcess implementations (FreeBSD, OpenBSD, DragonFly, NetBSD).
    Methods in oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd that return BsdPsKeyword
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static BsdPsKeyword
    BsdPsKeyword.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static BsdPsKeyword[]
    BsdPsKeyword.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd that return types with arguments of type BsdPsKeyword
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected abstract List<BsdPsKeyword>
    BsdOSProcess.psKeywords()
    Returns this platform's ordered ps column keys, used both to build the ps command and to parse its output positionally.
    Method parameters in oshi.software.common.os.unix.bsd with type arguments of type BsdPsKeyword
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected boolean
    BsdOSProcess.updateAttributes(Map<BsdPsKeyword, String> psMap)
    Populates this process's attributes from a parsed ps row.
